summary: Adjusted the opening paragraph to avoid mirroring chapter 10's time-led scaffold while preserving the storm stoppage, dispatch failure, and yard atmosphere. No calibration example lines were present to replace, and the chapter exit already fed the next chapter cleanly.
edits: Reframed the opening around the repeating hold announcement instead of a matching 'By [time]' construction.
Kept the same storm-stop facts, dispatch-board failure, and train-yard imagery with only sentence-order changes.
